message:
feat: replace decorative capsule signatures with Ed25519 canonical verification

Replace SHA-256 hash-based signing in universal_verifier_sdk with real
Ed25519 signatures over a canonical binary payload (v2 domain-separated
format). The signing payload now covers all manifest fields including
description, claim_type, creator_identity, created_at, metadata map,
and input_refs — not just the previous subset. Uses length-prefixed
encoding to prevent delimiter-collision ambiguity.

Add replay_capsule_signature_payload() to connector verifier_sdk for
constructing canonical signature payloads over replay capsule fields
including trace chunk hashes and commitment root.

Introduce verify_replay_capsule() in VerifierEconomyRegistry that
validates both integrity (hash check) and authenticity (Ed25519
signature verification against the registered verifier's public key,
plus attestation binding and claim_metadata_hash cross-check). The
ReplayCapsule struct now requires an AttestationSignature field.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
